introSection: Quantum Accelerator is an upcoming steel launched roller coaster currently located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. It is manufactured by Intamin and is set to open in 2026. It is built on the former site of Goliath, which was removed in 2021.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was previously set to open to the public on June 20, 2025. The opening date was later removed from the park's website and social media posts, implying a delayed opening.

On July 1, 2025, Six Flags announced that the ride would open in 2026.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Quantum Accelerator is an upcoming steel launched roller coaster currently located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. It is manufactured by Intamin and is set to open in 2026. It is built on the former site of Goliath, which was removed in 2021.

The ride was previously set to open to the public on June 20, 2025. The opening date was later removed from the park's website and social media posts, implying a delayed opening.

On July 1, 2025, Six Flags announced that the ride would open in 2026.



8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.
